name: claude-skills-consolidated
description: Deterministic operating substrate for Claude Code — hook-enforced rules (not advisory markdown), HETS multi-agent orchestration with persistent identity reputation + per-spawn budget enforcement, triple-contract output verifier, kb_scope enforcement, threshold-based auto self-improve loop, and chaos-test meta-validation. Hooks before, persistence around, verification after — compensates for LLM non-determinism at the seams without trying to replace the LLM.
